name: molpha-mcp
description: MCP server that lets AI agents create, fetch, verify, and publish Molpha oracle data.
long_description:
Molpha turns HTTP API responses into threshold-signed payloads that can be verified on Solana, EVM, and Starknet.

This extension exposes that workflow as MCP tools and keeps signing behind a local keypair, Privy, or Turnkey-backed wallet.

**Current release targets Solana Devnet and Sepolia verifier networks.** Treat it as testnet software. Write tools spend SOL and may consume subscription quota or x402 escrow funds unless dry-run mode is enabled.

tools.name: molpha_get_capabilities
tools.description: Return the registry version, node set, gateways, chains, verifier metadata, and x402 caps.

tools.name: molpha_describe_feed
tools.description: Read a feed's on-chain state and subscription status.

tools.name: molpha_derive_feed
tools.description: Locally derive a feedId from apiConfig + signaturesRequired. No transaction.

tools.name: molpha_agent_status
tools.description: Read the x402 agent escrow balance, committed amount, and quoted next price.

tools.name: molpha_fetch_verified
tools.description: Run a signing round and return the signed artifact plus verifier arguments. autoSubmit settles the Solana leg in the same call.

tools.name: molpha_get_latest
tools.description: Read the latest value stored in a Solana feed account.

tools.name: molpha_verify
tools.description: Build EVM/Starknet verifier address and call arguments. Calldata only — the agent executes verify() itself.

tools.name: molpha_execute
tools.description: Submit a signed data update to Solana. Accepts the molpha_fetch_verified output unmodified.

owner_keypair.title: Owner keypair
owner_keypair.description: Solana JSON keypair file. Required when signer backend is memory.

keychain_backend.title: Keychain backend
keychain_backend.description: privy or turnkey. Required when signer backend is keychain.

privy_wallet_address.title: Privy wallet address
privy_wallet_address.description: Solana address for the Privy wallet.

turnkey_wallet_address.title: Turnkey wallet address
turnkey_wallet_address.description: Solana address for the Turnkey wallet.

gateway_endpoints.title: Gateway endpoints
gateway_endpoints.description: Comma-separated Molpha gateway URLs. Leave empty to use the SDK default.

dry_run.title: Dry run
dry_run.description: Preview all write and spend operations without submitting them.

x402_max_price_usdc.title: x402 max price (USDC)
x402_max_price_usdc.description: Refuse to fund an x402 round priced above this amount (decimal USDC).

x402_max_spend_per_day_usdc.title: x402 max spend per day (USDC)
x402_max_spend_per_day_usdc.description: Process-local daily x402 spend cap (decimal USDC).

x402_gateway_pda.title: x402 gateway PDA
x402_gateway_pda.description: Optional settling gateway PDA (base58) to skip discovery when the escrow is already funded.
